problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to than, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
